sql_array: CREATE TABLE ip_addresses (id UInt32, ip_num UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
UPDATE ip_addresses SET ip_num = 4294967295 WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, IPv4NumToString(ip_num) AS ip_address FROM ip_addresses WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, IPv4NumToString(ip_num) AS ip_address FROM ip_addresses HAVING ip_num < 0;
